title: Plastic Free Wipe For Trainers, Clean & Protect Wipes 30Pk
features: PLASTIC FREE CLEANING!: Urban Kicks Trainer Cleaning Wipes, plastic free, biodegradable tough cleaning wipe. The wipes will bring your kicks up to a sparkling clean finish in no time and add life back into your footwear. A new product from the team @WeAreUrbanKicks

OUT OF BOX FOOTWEAR: Urban Kicks Trainer Cleaning Wipes, work hard to clean and renew dirty footwear, removing marks & scuffs with ease, bringing them back as good as new to keep footwear looking box fresh clean. Also suitable for use on leather, PVC, canvas and nylon footwear.

KICKS IN TIP TOP CONDITION!: Use Urban Kicks Trainer Cleaning Wipes with Urban Kicks Rain & Stain Barrier Spray and Trainer Erasers to keep your kicks into tip top condition ready to get out and impress

EASY TO USE: Open lid on pack, peel back the resealable label, remove wipes as required. Wipes across surface of footwear and leave to air dry. Snap the seal closed after each use t prevent the wipes from drying out. Do not use with other cleaning liquids.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Urban Kicks Pack of 30 ready to use, Plastic Free, Biodegradable wipes. Re-seal pack after each use
description: Product Description Urban Kicks Trainer Cleaning Wipes, plastic free, biodegradable tough cleaning wipe. The wipes will bring your kicks up to a sparkling clean finish in no time and add life back into your footwear. A new product from the team @WeAreUrbanKicks. Urban Kicks Trainer Cleaning Wipes, work hard to clean and renew dirty footwear, removing marks & scuffs with ease, bringing them back as good as new to keep footwear looking box fresh clean. Also suitable for use on leather, PVC, canvas and nylon footwear. Use Urban Kicks Trainer Cleaning Wipes with Urban Kicks Rain & Stain Barrier Spray and Trainer Erasers to keep your kicks into tip top condition ready to get out and impress. Pack of 30 ready to use, Plastic Free, Biodegradable wipes. Re-seal pack after each use Ingredients <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Anionic Surfactants, also contains: Imidazolidinyl Urea, Iodopropynyl Butylcarbanate, Phenoxyethanol.
